name: academorix/reporting
purpose: Tenant reporting surface — Dashboard layout, ReportDefinition + SavedReport catalogue, and ReportRun execution ledger for exports and scheduled digests.
capabilities: Dashboard Eloquent model (dsh_...) with widget layout
ReportRun execution ledger with status + output
Query builder over analytics + attribution rollups
when_to_use: Composing tenant-facing dashboards over analytics, attribution, and campaign data.
when_not_to_use: For raw event ingestion, use the sibling academorix/analytics package upstream.
